acceptance_source: current Codex conversation owner instruction after inspecting the split 36-panel review

review_artifact.encoding_note: deterministic PNG re-encoding of the pixel-identical product sheet inspected by the owner

task_label_decision: for product-scope rows use the displayed folder transition as the owner-reviewed task label; retain catalog and receipt conflicts in history
out_of_scope_decision: retain all five rows separately and exclude them from the current product evaluation
claim_boundary: This review accepts current cyan visual fiducial rings and inferred contact-center crosses as decent qualitative image-space annotations for the product-scope recordings. It does not validate the proposal homography, create metric board coordinates, identify transition A or b, establish self-centering or composability, validate simulator physics, or evaluate a learned policy.
